title: ‘Animal Friends,’ With Ryan Reynolds and Jason Momoa, Moves to Next Year
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

“Animal Friends,” the live action-animated hybrid film from Warner Bros, has moved from a planned June 5 release to Jan. 22, 2027, the studio announced Friday.Ryan Reynoldsvoices Pony whileJason Momoavoices Bear in the story of two fugitive animals.

Peter Atencio directs the adult-targeted road trip adventure that co-stars Aubrey Plaza as a DEA agent, Addison Rae, Dan Levy as a Fish and Wildlife ranger, Lil Rey Howery as the voice of a bird and Ellie Bamber.

Pony has been described as a tiny narcissist, while the large Bear is conflict-averse. They head out on an adventure across America to find the ranch they once lived on while being pursued by an equally odd couple DEA agent and Fish & Wildlife ranger.

Kevin Burrows and Matt Mider wrote the screenplay for Legendary, Maximum Effort and Prime Focus Studios.

“Animal Friends” has been hopping around the schedule like a fluffle of rabbits. First set for Aug. 15, 2025 through Columbia, it moved to Warner Bros. after Legendary’s distribution deal with Sony ended. Warners skedded the hybrid film for Oct. 10, then May 1 and June 5.

The June 5 date vacated by “Animal Friends” still has several other releases planned, including “Masters of the Universe” from Amazon/MGM, Nick Jonas and Paul Rudd starring in Lionsgate’s “Power Ballad” and “Scary Movie” from Paramount/Miramax.

Reynolds has action comedy “Mayday” coming out in September, while Momoa starred in “The Wrecking Crew” in January and has both “Street Fighter” and “Dune: Part Three” set for later in 2026.
title_zh: 《動物朋友》(Animal Friends) 由瑞安·雷諾斯(Ryan Reynolds)和傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)主演，將延期至明年上映。
content_zh:
由帕特·薩珀斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

華納兄弟(Warner Bros)的真人動畫混合電影《動物朋友》(Animal Friends)已將原定於6月5日的上映日期推遲至2027年1月22日，該工作室於週五宣布。瑞安·雷諾茲(Ryan Reynolds)為小馬配音，而傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)則為熊配音，故事講述了兩隻逃亡動物的冒險。

彼得·阿滕西奧(Peter Atencio)執導這部針對成人的公路冒險片，聯合主演包括奧布里·普拉扎(Aubrey Plaza)飾演DEA特工，艾迪森·瑞(Aaddison Rae)，丹·萊維(Dan Levy)飾演魚類與野生動物管理員，莉爾·雷·霍維(Lil Rey Howery)為一隻鳥配音，以及艾莉·班伯(Ellie Bamber)。

小馬被形容為一個微型自戀者，而大型的熊則是避免衝突的性格。他們踏上了一段穿越美國的冒險，尋找他們曾經居住的牧場，同時被一對同樣奇特的DEA特工和魚類與野生動物管理員追逐。

凱文·巴羅斯(Kevin Burrows)和馬特·米德(Matt Mider)為傳奇影業(Legendary)、最大努力(Maximum Effort)和Prime Focus Studios撰寫了劇本。

《動物朋友》(Animal Friends)的上映日期就像一群兔子一樣在日程中跳躍。最初定於2025年8月15日由哥倫比亞影業(Columbia)發行，隨後在傳奇影業與索尼(Sony)的發行協議結束後轉至華納兄弟。華納將這部混合電影安排在10月10日，然後是5月1日和6月5日。

《動物朋友》(Animal Friends)所空出的6月5日仍有其他幾部影片計劃上映，包括亞馬遜/MGM的《宇宙大師》(Masters of the Universe)、尼克·喬納斯(Nick Jonas)和保羅·路德(Paul Rudd)主演的獅門影業(Lionsgate)的《力量情歌》(Power Ballad)，以及派拉蒙/米拉麥克斯(Paramount/Miramax)的《驚聲尖叫》(Scary Movie)。

雷諾茲(Ryan Reynolds)的動作喜劇《緊急求救》(Mayday)將於九月上映，而莫瑪(Jason Momoa)在一月主演的《破壞小組》(The Wrecking Crew)中有出色表現，並且在2026年稍晚將有《街頭霸王》(Street Fighter)和《沙丘：第三部》(Dune: Part Three)的上映。
summary_zh:
由帕特·薩珀斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

華納兄弟(Warner Bros)的真人動畫混合電影《動物朋友》(Animal Friends)已將原定於6月5日的上映日期推遲至2027年1月22日，該工作室於週五宣布。瑞安·雷諾茲(Ryan Reynolds)為小馬配音，而傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)則為熊配音，故事講述了兩隻逃亡動物的冒險。
